projects.summary_placeholder: Describe the current status, challenges, and background. Used as the starting point for AI discussion.

right_panel.ceo_response_desc: Enter the missing information the CEO identified. It will be reflected in the Round 4 discussion.
right_panel.ceo_response_placeholder: e.g., Neighborhood briefing not yet held; additional budget not yet negotiated; only standard construction insurance.

themes.delay_desc: Discuss schedule delay recovery with the expert team
themes.go_no_go_desc: Decide whether to proceed from multiple perspectives
themes.design_change_desc: Analyze the impact and risks of design changes
themes.custom_desc: Set a specific issue freely and consult
themes.desc_placeholder: e.g., Discuss how to negotiate price/schedule with subcontractors

setup.title: 📢 Discussion setup
setup.context_placeholder: e.g., Foundation work delayed 2 weeks due to typhoon. Need to coordinate with M&E. Currently 35% complete overall.
setup.constraints_placeholder: e.g., Completion date is fixed. Additional budget capped at 5M JPY. Night work requires neighbor consent.
setup.goal_placeholder: e.g., Decide concrete steps to recover delay with minimal cost increase while maintaining quality.

welcome.title: Start a decision discussion
welcome.instruction: Select a project from the list on the left.

agents_page.heading: 👥 Expert team management
agents_page.intro: Customize the agents that participate in the discussion. Adding a 5th agent or beyond is also possible.
agents_page.system_prompt_placeholder: e.g., Review contractual risks and legal alignment as the highest priority.
agents_page.style_placeholder: e.g., Always emphasizes risk and asks for legal grounds.

knowledge_page.heading: 📚 Knowledge base (past cases)
knowledge_page.intro: Past project cases that feed the AI discussion. They are automatically cited during the conversation.
knowledge_page.demo_empty: No cases shown in demo mode.
knowledge_page.title_placeholder: e.g., Recovery of schedule delay on a large retail project
knowledge_page.summary_placeholder: Describe the situation, challenges, and actions taken
knowledge_page.outcome_placeholder: Describe the outcome and lessons for the future

summary_export.title: Construction Decision Support Platform — Discussion Summary
